diffs.diff:
--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -114,50 +114,49 @@
 

         # Encode features

         if self.encoding_type == 'linear':

-            x = self.node_emb(x.float())

-            edge_attr = self.edge_emb(edge_attr.float())

+            h = self.node_emb(x.float())

+            edge_feat = self.edge_emb(edge_attr.float())

         else:

             node_offsets_t = torch.tensor(NODE_OFFSETS, device=x.device, dtype=x.dtype)

             node_max_vals = torch.tensor([v - 1 for v in NODE_FEAT_VOCABS], device=x.device, dtype=x.dtype)

             zeros = torch.zeros_like(x)

             x_clamped = torch.max(torch.min(x, node_max_vals.unsqueeze(0)), zeros)

             x_indices = x_clamped + node_offsets_t

-            x = self.node_emb(x_indices).sum(dim=1)

+            h = self.node_emb(x_indices).sum(dim=1)

 

             edge_offsets_t = torch.tensor(EDGE_OFFSETS, device=edge_attr.device, dtype=edge_attr.dtype)

             edge_max_vals = torch.tensor([v - 1 for v in EDGE_FEAT_VOCABS], device=edge_attr.device, dtype=edge_attr.dtype)

             e_zeros = torch.zeros_like(edge_attr)

             e_clamped = torch.max(torch.min(edge_attr, edge_max_vals.unsqueeze(0)), e_zeros)

             e_indices = e_clamped + edge_offsets_t

-            edge_attr = self.edge_emb(e_indices).sum(dim=1)

+            edge_feat = self.edge_emb(e_indices).sum(dim=1)

 

-        # Initialize virtual node

-        vn_indices = torch.zeros(num_graphs, dtype=torch.long, device=x.device)

-        vn_feat = self.vn_emb(vn_indices)  # [G, H]

+        # Virtual node initialization

+        vn = self.vn_emb(torch.zeros(num_graphs, dtype=torch.long, device=x.device))  # [G, H]

 

-        # Add VN to node features

-        h = x + vn_feat[batch]  # [N, H]

         layer_outputs = [h]

+        for i in range(self.num_layers):

+            # Add virtual node features to node features

+            vn_per_graph = vn[batch]  # [N, H]

+            h = h + vn_per_graph

 

-        for i in range(self.num_layers):

-            # Message passing

-            h = self.convs[i](h, edge_index, edge_attr)

+            # GINE convolution

+            h = self.convs[i](h, edge_index, edge_feat)

             h = self.bns[i](h)

             h = F.relu(h)

             h = F.dropout(h, p=self.dropout, training=self.training)

 

-            # Virtual node update

-            vn_aggr = global_mean_pool_manual(h, batch, num_graphs)  # [G, H]

-            vn_feat = vn_feat + F.dropout(self.vn_mlp_list[i](vn_aggr), p=self.dropout, training=self.training)

+            layer_outputs.append(h)

 

-            # Add VN back to nodes

-            h = h + vn_feat[batch]  # [N, H]

-            layer_outputs.append(h)

+            # Update virtual node

+            vn_h = global_mean_pool_manual(h, batch, num_graphs)  # [G, H]

+            vn = vn + self.vn_mlp_list[i](vn_h)

 

         # Jumping Knowledge

         if self.use_jk:

-            weights = F.softmax(self.jk_attention, dim=0)

-            h = sum(w * h_i for w, h_i in zip(weights, layer_outputs))

+            stacked = torch.stack(layer_outputs, dim=0)  # [L+1, N, H]

+            attn = F.softmax(self.jk_attention, dim=0)  # [L+1]

+            h = (stacked * attn.unsqueeze(1).unsqueeze(2)).sum(dim=0)  # [N, H]

 

         # Graph pooling

         graph_h = global_mean_pool_manual(h, batch, num_graphs)  # [G, H]
